changes: 🔒 Content privacy system — inventory items and spells in the shared library are now linked to the account that created them, private by default
🌐 Public content toggle — item and spell creators can mark their content as public to share with the community; a globe/lock badge shows the current status
👥 Community Items — when public content is enabled, a Community Items section appears in Inventory showing public items from other players that can be copied to your campaign library
✨ Community Spells — when public content is enabled, a Community Spells section appears in the Spell Library showing public spells from other players that DMs can add to their library
⚙️ Account Settings — a new Account Settings section in Campaign Select lets players toggle 'Show Public Content' on/off
⚠️ Age warning — enabling public content shows a confirmation dialog warning that community content may not be suitable for all ages
🏷️ Creator attribution — items and spells display the username of whoever created them
📋 Decision audit log — significant account setting changes (e.g. enabling/disabling public content) are recorded to a personal decision history in Firestore
🕐 Decision history panel — Account Settings now includes a collapsible Decision History section showing a timestamped log of past decisions
✖️ Added X close button to the Dice Roller panel header for easy dismissal on mobile
✨ Added Spell System — crawlers can now learn and cast spells with mana costs, damage dice, schools, durations, and special effects
📖 Added Spell Library — DMs can create reusable spells with full stat configuration (damage type, dice, hit modifiers, AoE, saving throws, etc.)
🧙 Added Spell Tomes — consumable inventory items that teach crawlers a spell when used; supports both library spells and embedded custom one-off spells
⭐ Added Spell Mastery — spells level up through repeated casting (10, 30, 60 casts…), reducing mana cost by 5% per mastery level
🎯 Added Spells page — browse the spell library, grant spells directly to crawlers, track cast counts and mastery progression per crawler
🗡️ Spell Tomes in inventory show a Wand icon and a Use button — clicking Use consumes the tome and adds the spell to the crawler's known spells
⚡ Spells support Action or Bonus Action casting, variable mana cost (can be 0), optional self-targeting, and combat/noncombat turn durations
🐛 Added confirmation dialog before deleting maps — prevents accidental deletion with a single misclick
♿ Added aria-labels to map edit and delete icon buttons for screen reader accessibility
🗺️ Episode cards in Show Time now display loot box and quest counts alongside map and mob counts
♿ Added aria-label to the Add Action Item button in quest creation form
⚔️ New mobs and crawlers placed on episode maps now spread out in a grid pattern instead of all stacking at center (50%, 50%)
🐛 Fixed changelog modal — now closes on Escape key, outside click, and route changes
🐛 Fixed page refresh losing campaign context — session now persists across reloads
🔗 Added deep linking support — campaign ID is preserved in URL for bookmarking and sharing
🐛 Fixed identity selection — DMs and players now skip splash screen when re-entering a campaign
🐛 Fixed display name showing Google auth name instead of user-configured name
🐛 Removed debug 'roomId' text from Sound Effects page
🐛 Fixed broken markdown links in Wiki — internal links now navigate correctly
🐛 Fixed stray scissors icon on Show Time page — replaced PinOff icon with dimmed Pin icon
📱 Added responsive hamburger menu for mobile devices
♿ Added skip navigation link for keyboard users
♿ Added focus-visible outlines on all interactive elements
♿ Added aria-labels to icon-only buttons and form inputs
♿ Added ARIA landmarks to Campaign selection page
⚡ Gated debug console logging behind development mode flag
👥 Added Friend Request System — send, accept, decline, and cancel friend requests by username
👥 Friends list — view accepted friends with option to remove them
👥 Pending requests badge — incoming friend requests show a notification count on the Friends section
👥 Friends section on Campaign screen — collapsible panel with add friend form, incoming/sent requests, and friend list
🏰 MAJOR: Added Campaign System — create, join, copy, and manage campaigns with isolated game data
🏰 Campaign-based DM access — the campaign creator is automatically the DM with full DM Console access (replaces old password system)
🏰 Invite links — DMs can share invite codes/links to let players join their campaign (max 10 players per campaign)
🏰 Campaign selection screen — authenticated users see their owned and joined campaigns before entering the game
🏰 Copy Campaign — DMs can duplicate a campaign's structure (mobs, maps, episodes, quests, wiki) for reuse
🏰 Campaign deletion — removes all room-scoped game data (episodes, placements, etc.) while preserving global templates
👤 User Profiles — authenticated users now set up a unique username and display name on first sign-in
👤 Username validation — usernames must be 3-24 characters, alphanumeric + underscores, and globally unique
🔗 Join via invite link — /join/:inviteCode route lets users join campaigns directly from a shared URL
🧭 Back to Campaigns — navigate back to the campaign list from any screen (Splash, Menu, or Navigation bar)
🗑️ Removed old DM password login system — DM access is now determined by campaign ownership
🔐 Added Google Sign-In — users can now sign in with their Google account to enable write access (anonymous users can still browse read-only)
🔐 Sign In / Sign Out button available on Splash Screen, Main Menu, and Navigation bar
🔐 Firestore security rules updated to allow anonymous reads but require Google auth for writes
🔐 Added email/password account creation — users can create a password-protected account using their email (or continue with Google)
🔐 New auth modal with Sign In / Create Account tabs, accessible from any screen
🔐 Write access now works for any authenticated user (Google or email/password), not just Google
🐛 Fixed: anonymous users could still edit data client-side — writes now blocked with a toast message when not signed in
🐛 Fixed Google sign-in popup closing immediately — now handles auth errors (unauthorized domain, popup closed) gracefully with user-friendly messages
🐛 Fixed Main Menu layout — moved sign-in button next to the player selector instead of displacing it
🐛 Fixed race condition in loot box claiming — inventory, gold, and loot box updates are now properly awaited to prevent data loss
🐛 Fixed Firebase listener leak when switching rooms — listeners created during async auth initialization are now properly cleaned up
🐛 Fixed item consolidation mismatch between Profiles and Inventory views — identical items now group consistently across both views
🐛 Fixed weapon upgrade modal persisting stale data when switching between crawlers
🐛 Fixed inventory document IDs not using crawlerId convention — new inventory documents now correctly use the crawler ID as the Firestore document ID
📜 MAJOR: Added Quest system — DMs can create quests with action items, tiered rewards, and descriptions
📜 New Quests tab in the DM Console for creating and managing premade quests
📜 Quest action items can be shown/hidden to players with eye toggle (hidden by default)
📜 Quest rewards support Dirt/Copper/Silver/Gold tiers with show/hide visibility controls
📜 DMs can assign quests to crawlers from the ShowTime map selector (next to loot boxes)
📜 Default-select-all crawlers when assigning a quest; becomes a 'Party Quest' if all crawlers participate
📜 New Quests tab on crawler profile page showing assigned quests with expandable details
📜 Quest notes: crawlers can add date-stamped text notes visible to all quest participants
📜 DM can check off action items per-crawler from ShowTime — completed items show strikethrough for players
📜 Quest assignment, action reveal/completion, and reward reveal push notifications to the dice menu
📜 Toast notifications appear for players when they receive a new quest
📜 DMs can link quests to episodes in the episode builder (similar to loot boxes)
🐛 Fixed blank ShowTime page caused by TDZ variable ordering issue in quest code
🐛 Fixed additional ShowTime TDZ crash — allPlacementsMobCounts was referenced before declaration in combat mob removal callbacks
📜 Added drag-to-reorder for quest action items and rewards on the DM console Quests tab
📜 Quest rewards can now be claimed — when a DM completes all action items and reveals the reward, players see a 'Claim' button to add it to their inventory
⚔️ Mob token letters are now stable — deleting a token no longer reorders other tokens of the same type (e.g., deleting Flurg B leaves Flurg C and Flurg D unchanged)
⚔️ Deleting a mob from the map during active combat now automatically removes it from the combat turn order
👤 Player identity switcher dropdown now available on the Main Menu screen
👤 Dungeon AI (DM) login option added to the player switcher dropdown on all pages
Crawlers can now switch to DM mode directly from the navigation bar without returning to the main menu
Password-protected DM access with inline password prompt in the dropdown
📦 Item Library now has expandable item details (click any item name to see full stats, weapon data, and modifiers)
📦 Added search bar to Item Library — top 10 search results are pulled to the top of the list
📦 Item Library now has a scrollable fixed-height container for easier browsing
📦 Added equipment slot filter dropdown to Item Library (filter by Weapon, Head, Chest, etc.)
📖 MAJOR: Added Wiki system accessible from the main navigation bar
Wiki features: full-text search, category navigation, table of contents, and subpage structure
Any user can edit wiki pages directly from the browser (content saves to Firebase in real-time)
Wiki ships with pre-written documentation covering all game features and mechanics
📋 Added expandable item details on the inventory page (click any item name to see full stats, weapon data, and modifiers)
🎲 Fixed weapon dice display in dice roller: now shows actual weapon dice instead of always 'd20'
Individual die results are broken out for multi-die weapon rolls (e.g., d12 5, d12 7 instead of 2d12 12)
Attack rolls labeled 'Attack roll:' and damage rolls labeled 'Damage:' instead of generic 'Check:'
⚔️ Added splash damage checkbox to weapon configuration in item library
👤 Player identity switcher moved to top-right corner of navigation bar for easier access
🌫️ Increased fog of war precision: consolidation threshold raised from 1000 to 3000 circles
🌫️ Fog brush minimum size increased to match crawler/mob icon size on the map
🐛 Added null checks to all Firebase Firestore calls to prevent crashes when db is unavailable
🐛 Removed direct useFirebaseStore() call from ShowTimeView (now receives roomId as a prop)
🐛 Fixed stale closure in player showtime listener that could miss episode changes
🐛 Fixed stale closure in avatar upload that could lose concurrent form edits
🐛 Fixed stale mapBoxes closure in box add/update/delete handlers causing lost updates during rapid interaction
🐛 Fixed episode sync effect overwriting local drag positions during mob drag operations
🐛 Fixed DiceRoller interval not being cleaned up on component unmount
🐛 Removed debug console.log from ShowTimeView render path (was running every render cycle)
🐛 Removed unused consolidateFogCircles dependency from handleFogReveal callback
🐛 Removed unused rollMobInitiatives destructured variable from Index.tsx
⚡ Stabilized ShowTimeView callback props with useCallback to prevent excessive effect re-firing
⚡ Optimized getStableCollection to cache serialized hashes instead of double-stringifying on every call
⚡ Memoized inventory reference in ProfilesView to prevent cascading recomputation of dependent memos
⚡ All async Firebase calls in useGameState now properly return promises for error propagation
📝 Fixed MAX_IMAGE_LENGTH documentation in CLAUDE.md (was incorrectly listed as 15 MB, actual limit is ~1 MB)
⚔️ Added equip/unequip system for mob inventory items (double-click or right-click to equip)
Right-click context menu on mob inventory items with equip, expand details, and remove options
Expandable item detail panels for mob inventory showing description, gold value, slot, tags, stat modifiers, and weapon data
Equipped mob items highlighted with gold border and shield icon
👤 Added player identity switching via dropdown in the navigation bar
🎮 Added Play the Game / Game Over button for DMs in the game clock panel
Players see a waiting screen until the DM clicks Play the Game
Game start/stop notifications pushed to dice roll history and as toast notifications
🔧 Fixed game clock panel mouse scrolling (no longer blocked by map zoom handler)
🔧 Fixed changelog window scrolling with same native wheel handler approach
Hidden scrollbar in game clock panel for cleaner appearance
📏 Rounded zoom percentage display to whole numbers
🐛 Fixed TDZ (Temporal Dead Zone) error causing blank page in production builds
❤️ Health bars on all map icons: mob and crawler icons now always display green/red health bars with currentHP/maxHP text
🛡️ Crawler health bars show equipment modifier bonus as orange bar portion (matching profile view)
🐛 Fixed independent mob health tracking: duplicate mobs (Greg A, Greg B) now take damage independently instead of sharing HP
🎲 Mob initiative rolls now appear in the dice panel so players can see what each mob rolled
📦 Players can now edit inventory items (name, description) on the inventory page — edit button accessible to all users
⚔️ Weapon upgrade modal now lets players edit the weapon name during upgrade
🎯 Weapon ATTACK button now auto-rolls damage dice alongside the d20 attack roll when outside of combat
🐛 Fixed DM overlay panels getting pushed off screen: DiceRoller, MapToolsMenu, and mob display cards now clamp to viewport
🐛 Fixed runtime mob combat ID matching so duplicate runtime mobs display correct per-instance health
🎮 Runtime-added mobs and crawlers (placed during ShowTime) now appear in combat setup and rest selection
➕ New 'Add to Combat' button allows adding combatants mid-combat during both initiative and combat phases
⚔️ Mobs auto-roll initiative when added to combat; crawlers wait for player roll
⚔️ MAJOR: Full weapon system with configurable damage types and weapon types
Weapon config UI in item library: hit die, damage dice, stat modifiers, ranged/melee, range, special effects
Equipped weapons appear as attack cards in crawler Attacks tab with ATTACK and DAMAGE buttons
Right-click weapon attack for advantage/disadvantage rolls (2d20 take highest/lowest)
Weapon upgrade system: right-click weapon in inventory to upgrade stats, marked with 'Upgraded' label
⚔️ Combat turn counter displayed next to noncombat turn counter
Cancel combat button during both initiative and combat phases
🐛 Fixed React error #310: moved useMemo before early return to fix hooks ordering
⚔️ MAJOR: Combat system with initiative, turn order, and damage
DM starts combat from PingPanel: select crawlers and mobs to enter combat
Initiative phase: crawlers roll d20 for initiative, mobs auto-roll
Combat phase: turn-based order sorted by initiative, action/bonus action tracking
Damage target modal: select target, roll damage dice, apply damage with HP tracking
Per-combatant HP tracking for duplicate mobs (Greg A, Greg B with separate health)
Bonus actions tab: Off-hand Attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide
Combat order display bar at top of map during active combat
Episode-scoped combat state: switching episodes hides unrelated combat
🐛 Fixed DM view panel visibility: overlays raised above footer, PingPanel shows with noncombat turns
🐛 Fixed map blocker scoped to map container only (no longer blocks entire screen)
🗺️ Client-side URL routing: browser back/forward works without reload
📦 Firebase Storage for large map uploads: bypasses Firestore 1MB field limit
📦 MAJOR: Loot box system — DM creates templates, sends to crawlers, unlocks when ready, players claim items
Loot box tiers: Dirt, Copper, Silver, Gold with tier-colored UI
Dedicated 'Loot Boxes' tab in DM Console with quantity selector
Toast notifications for new and unlocked loot boxes
'Claim All' button on profile to instantly claim all unlocked items
Loot box sends appear in dice roller history
📦 Loot boxes now include gold rewards
🎴 Mob cards sync to all players via Firebase, simplified expand/collapse UI
💰 Gold field added to loot boxes (create/send/claim)
📦 Consolidated duplicate inventory items with count badges (×3)
✏️ Added edit functionality for inventory library items
🐛 Fixed map container not expanding with scale
🗺️ Full-screen map designer popout for episode editor with drag positioning
💰 Send gold and items between crawlers from profile page
🎒 Inventory improvements: library-only item creation, consolidated count badges
🔒 Hidden loot box gold until DM unlocks
🐛 Fixed noncombat button crash caused by React event leaking into Firebase
🐛 Fixed map container width fallback when image not yet loaded
⏰ Game clock is now episode-dependent
🐛 Fixed noncombat rolls, episode close, equipment slots, inventory panel, and image limit issues
🐛 Fixed inventory duplicate items and cleaned up unused imports
📏 Ruler tool now visible to all players in real-time - users can see each other's measurements
🐛 Fixed ruler dismiss click being blocked by invisible bounding box of triangle shape effects
🏷️ Added editable name labels below all crawler and mob icons on the map (per-episode, synced in real-time)
🎨 Removed blue circle level indicator from crawler icons for cleaner appearance
📋 Mob type labels (BOSS/NPC/NORMAL) now appear under the mob image on the Mobs page instead of to the side
🔍 Decreased mouse scroll zoom sensitivity on the map for finer control
📏 Added ruler tool to ShowTime map for measuring distance in feet
🐛 Fixed map zoom triggering when scrolling dice roller on showtime page
🎲 Synced dice rolls across all connected players in real-time
Clickable stat rolls - click a stat to auto-roll d20 + modifier
Dice roller UI improvements: collapsible options, full-height panel, relative timestamps, auto-scroll
📦 Added shared item library with per-crawler search in inventory
⚔️ Added HP/Mana modifiers and stat modifiers to inventory items
Equipment layout improvements with expand/collapse and full-width UI
🐛 Fixed triangle shape border, click-off flash, and placement over triangles
🗺️ Map base scale now uses CSS transform for proper scaling of all overlays
Fixed map rendering: consistent base size, auto width, zoom down to 1%
Icons and shapes counter-scale to maintain consistent sizes across map scales
🐛 Fixed fog consolidation causing visible jumps on large maps
🎨 Added shape borders, doubled max shape size, added fog paint brush
Shape controls now persist until clicking away, stick to shape edges
Fixed rotation jerk on first move, deselect shape after placement
🧹 Removed Lovable and Netlify dependencies - project now fully hosted on GitHub Pages with Firebase
🔊 Fixed Freesound sound effects search - searches now pull results directly from Freesound API
Added 10-minute client-side cache for sound searches to prevent rate limiting (429 errors)
Sound results no longer disappear when API rate limit is hit - existing results are preserved
🐛 Fixed map visibility/names arrays not shrinking when maps are deleted
🐛 Fixed weak image fingerprint hash - now uses 4 sections for more reliable duplicate detection
🐛 Fixed optimistic delete rollback using atomic state capture to prevent stale data
🐛 Fixed broadcastDragState stale closure with useCallback wrapper
🗺️ Episode map scale now changes physical map size instead of viewport zoom
At 200% scale, the map image is twice as large, making icons/effects appear relatively smaller
Map scale settings sync in real-time from DM console to ShowTime view via JSON deep comparison
🔧 Reduced scroll zoom sensitivity by 50% for finer control
🐛 Fixed map persisting from previous episode when switching episodes
📌 Ping panel now snaps below navigation pane and shifts to top when nav collapses
Navigation pane hover trigger limited to left 60% of screen to avoid accidental triggers near ping panel
Fixed pin button on navigation pane appearing disabled
🐛 Fixed cross-episode state bleeding - shapes, fog, icons, and crawlers fully reset on episode switch
🐛 Fixed cross-map state bleeding - all per-map state resets when switching maps within an episode
🐛 Fixed scroll zoom causing buttons to disappear off-screen (now uses global window listener)
Firebase listeners now clear state when no document exists for a map
⚡ MAJOR: Fixed real-time sync lag with Firebase batch writes, debouncing, and optimistic updates
🎨 Added smooth CSS transitions for mob/crawler icons, shapes, and fog of war
Shapes and fog of war changes now animate smoothly for all connected players
🌫️ Fixed fog of war circle consolidation - fog no longer reappears after extensive clearing
Replaced array trimming with intelligent merging algorithm that combines overlapping circles
Added Gaussian blur filter for softer fog edges
🌫️ Fog of war state now persists across sessions (enabled/disabled + revealed areas saved to Firebase)
🔍 Zoom level now always defaults to 100% on page load
🎒 Inventory improvements: added weapon slot to equipment system
🔧 Fixed ShowTime UI positioning and optimized drag performance
🎮 ShowTime UI improvements and interaction enhancements
Fixed various ShowTime UI issues
📡 MAJOR: Real-time sync for DM episode/map selection to all players
Players automatically see the map the DM selects without manual refresh
🔧 Fixed icon scaling to maintain consistent sizes across zoom levels
🎨 Expanded character profile UI with more detail
🐛 Fixed mob icon dragging with proper cursor and event handling
🎛️ Consolidated DM controls into MapToolsMenu for cleaner UI
Fixed episode tab, user controls, and naming issues
Fixed DM controls z-index to prevent overlap with tools panel
🖱️ Added cursor follower effect on ShowTime map
🔍 Added zoom +/- button controls for map viewing
Fixed ShowTimeView initialization order bug
📍 MAJOR: Added Ping system for map communication
All users can ping any location on the map to draw attention
Pings appear as animated ripple effects visible to all players
8 color options for pings (red, blue, green, yellow, purple, orange, cyan, pink)
Pings sync in real-time via Firebase to all connected users
Pings auto-fade after 2 seconds
📦 MAJOR: Added Highlight Boxes for map annotations
DM can add transparent boxes to highlight areas on the map
Boxes can be moved, resized, and rotated with drag handles
Adjustable box color and opacity (10%-90%)
Boxes sync in real-time to all players
🎨 New Map Tools Menu at top of map
Ping and Box mode buttons with color picker
Expandable menu for additional options
🌫️ Fog of War improvements
Fog is now fully opaque for players (completely hides content)
Fog is semi-transparent for DM (can see what's hidden)
🗺️ Map Scale expanded to 5000%
📐 Grid improvements
Grid size fixed to 64px to match mob icon size
Removed grid scale slider for consistency
👤 Default user selection
Added 'Just a Boring PC' option for spectators
Set as default selection in player selector
Spectators group added to player selector
👥 MAJOR: Crawler Icons on Maps
DM can now place crawler (player character) icons on maps
Crawler icons display player avatar, level, and HP bar
Crawler placements sync in real-time to all players
DM can remove crawler icons with X button
🎮 MAJOR: DM can add mobs/crawlers during ShowTime
New +Crawler and +Mob buttons in Map Tools Menu
DM can select from available crawlers or mobs to place
Click on map to place the selected character
Runtime placements are separate from episode-defined placements
All placements sync in real-time
🌫️ MAJOR: Enhanced Fog of War system
Fog of War is now map-dependent - each map in an episode has its own fog settings
Added separate Eraser toggle - DM can enable/disable eraser without affecting fog visibility
Eraser mode shows brush size slider when active
Reset button covers entire map with fog again (renamed from Clear All)
🗺️ Map Scale improvements
Scale is now per-map - each map can have its own zoom level
Scale controls moved to DM console Episodes tab only (cleaner ShowTime UI)
Mob icons maintain fixed size regardless of map scale (no more tiny/huge mobs)
Scale range expanded: 25% to 200%
👾 MAJOR: Mob icons are now map-dependent
Mobs placed on a map only appear on that specific map
When editing episodes, mob placements are per-map
Map navigation shows correct mobs for each map
🎴 Fixed Mob Card visibility on ShowTime page
Mob cards now render outside the map container
Cards no longer affected by map scaling transform
Cards appear correctly at bottom-right of screen
🔧 Technical improvements
Added mapId field to EpisodeMobPlacement for per-map tracking
Backwards compatible - old episodes default mobs to first map
Per-map settings UI in episode editor shows current map name and settings
🌫️ Added Fog of War system for maps
Fog of War overlay covers the entire map with semi-transparent darkness
DM can reveal areas by clicking/dragging with adjustable brush size
Fog of War covers mob icons on the map (mobs hidden until fog cleared)
Real-time sync - revealed areas sync instantly to all players
Clear All button to reset fog of war and re-hide the entire map
🔍 Added Map Scale controls
DM can zoom in/out on maps (25% to 200% scale)
Scale setting syncs to all players in real-time
🎴 Fixed Mob Card display issues
Mob cards now appear to the LEFT of the dice menu (no more overlap)
Multiple mob cards stack horizontally
Fixed card jumping when resizing - smooth transitions now
Cards can be freely dragged anywhere on screen
📜 Updated changelog with all changes since January 12
🎨 MAJOR: Enhanced Crawler Profile UI with equipment slot system
Added equipment slot system: Head, Chest, Left Hand, Right Hand, Ring, Legs, Feet
Equipment slots arranged anatomically (head on top, hands flanking chest, feet on bottom)
Drag-and-drop inventory items to equipment slots to equip them
Added equipment slot selector when creating/editing inventory items
Expanded inventory view with toggleable item descriptions
Larger inventory items with better spacing and readability
Item tooltips showing full names on hover
Fixed inventory Firebase persistence - items now save correctly using document IDs
Added inline inventory management on crawler profile page
🔧 Fixed Freesound API rate limiting by creating Firebase Cloud Function proxy
Disabled direct Freesound API calls from client to prevent token exposure
Added 1-hour caching to reduce API calls
Falls back to local sound filtering when proxy unavailable
🖼️ Improved avatar upload with image resizing and 500KB limit
Fixed Firestore write stream exhaustion on avatar upload
Added custom map names display in Episodes tab
🎮 Real-time mob dragging synchronization in ShowTime
Mob icons follow cursor smoothly during drag operations
Throttled Firestore broadcasts to prevent rate limiting
Mob positions sync instantly across all connected players
Prevented mob icons from being dragged outside map boundaries
Moved DM controls above the map for better visibility
Made map unselectable on showtime screen
🔊 Sound Effects improvements: enhanced search bar and stop button
Stop button immediately halts sound playback
Simplified search bar styling
Fixed map upload and display issues
Fixed DungeonAIView: Rebuilt component with proper state management
Simplified Episodes tab with unified create/edit form
Fixed critical bug: app stuck on loading when Firebase unavailable
Fixed critical TypeScript lint errors
🎨 MAJOR: Enhanced Episode system with visual mob placement and map management
Added visual drag-and-drop mob placement editor: DMs can now drag mob icons directly onto maps to position them
Created MobIcon component: circular mob tokens with head-centered positioning and HP indicators
Created MapMobPlacementEditor component: full visual editor with available/placed mob management
Added grid overlay system: DMs can toggle a semi-transparent grid on maps (both in Episode Editor and ShowTime)
Map naming feature: DMs can now name and edit map labels in the Map Manager for better organization
ShowTime improvements: DMs can toggle grid overlay while presenting episodes to players
Grid overlay helps DMs with precise mob positioning and provides visual reference for gameplay
Improved UI/UX: all controls are intuitive with clear visual feedback and minimal learning curve
Created GridOverlay SVG component for smooth, scalable grid rendering
Enhanced MapsView with inline editing for map names (click edit icon, type name, save with checkmark)
🎬 MAJOR: Added Episode system for D&D session management
Episodes feature: DMs can now create named episodes with descriptions, predefined maps, and positioned mobs
Episode Creator in Dungeon AI console: intuitive form to create episodes with map selection (checkboxes) and mob positioning (0-100% X/Y sliders)
ShowTime view redesigned to support Episodes: DMs select an episode, then choose which map to display and which mobs to show
Real-time mob placement on maps using percentage-based coordinates (0-100%) for flexible scaling
Created ResizableMobDisplay component: draggable, resizable mob tokens with expandable details panel
Mob display features: compact mode (bottom-right corner) and expanded mode (full details with stats, weaknesses, strengths)
Episodes support multiple maps per session and multiple mobs with independent positioning
Added full Episode CRUD operations to useGameState hook with timestamps
Episodes automatically sync across all players in real-time via Firebase
Added 'episodes' collection type to Firebase Firestore persistence
Hardened Firebase mob persistence: strip undefined fields, diff adds/updates/deletes, and raise image size guard
Added client-side mob image resize/compress with oversize protection to prevent Firestore rejects
Fixed Dungeon AI console render break by aliasing lucide Image icon
Documented end-to-end Firebase persistence testing steps (FIREBASE_PERSISTENCE_TEST.md)
Added scripts for Firebase CRUD smoke tests and deployment diagnostics
🔥 MAJOR: Migrated from file-based storage to Firebase Firestore for cloud persistence and real-time multiplayer
Added real-time synchronization - changes instantly sync across all players in the same room
Implemented room-based multiplayer system with invite links and room codes
Created RoomManager component for creating, joining, and leaving multiplayer rooms
Added Firebase configuration with environment variable support
Created comprehensive Firebase setup guide (docs/FIREBASE_SETUP.md)
Added data migration script (scripts/migrate-to-firebase.js) to transfer existing data to Firestore
Removed dependency on backend server - app now runs on any static host (GitHub Pages, Netlify, Vercel)
Implemented universal data persistence system - all user-created data (crawlers, mobs, maps, inventory) automatically saves
Fixed server API endpoints that were incorrectly nested, making game data loading/saving functional
Fixed CORS issues by configuring Vite proxy for seamless API communication
Created generic DataStore hook (useDataStore/useFirebaseStore) that automatically persists any data type
Added GameContext provider for global data access throughout the app
Increased server payload limit to 50MB to support large map images
Optimized localStorage to exclude large data (maps) and prevent quota errors
Added comprehensive documentation (DATA_PERSISTENCE.md) with usage examples and best practices
Added GitHub Copilot instructions file to guide AI assistants in using correct data patterns
Added TypeScript types for collection names with autocomplete support
Enhanced logging system with detailed [FirebaseStore] console messages for debugging
Made data persistence extensible - new data types (quests, NPCs, spells, etc.) can be added with zero configuration
Fixed Dungeon AI login persistence across navigations (localStorage + in-memory state)
When logged into the Dungeon AI, the main crawler field now switches to the Dungeon AI profile (and restores previous player on logout)
Dice Roller: controls are pinned and visible when panel is expanded (no more hidden button controls)
DM page: allow content to wrap and resize so controls (Hide / Trash) remain visible on narrow windows
Dice Roller: moved roll history to the top; panel now grows up to the top of the viewport and becomes scrollable when full
Dice Roller: grouped multi-dice rolls into collapsible entries showing per-die results and a roll total
Added new Sound Effects system: searchable library (Freesound API integration via server proxy), recent and favorites boxes, upload support, and server-backed broadcast for site-wide playback
Added server proxy endpoint `/api/sounds/search` with caching and basic rate limiting
Fixed Dungeon AI page layout and overflow issues so boxes no longer extend past the main container
Made active navigation buttons' borders thicker to better indicate current page
